pane_name: Pane 5 - database transaction/object lifecycle/staged write residual

allocation_rules.pane6_note: No unallocated generic hard_blocked operation remained after specific-domain allocation; Pane 6 contains future-facing validation debt only.

claims.current_blocker: HARD_BLOCKED_AFTER_WAVE3: database transaction or staged-write residual lacks bounded write-safety and evidence.
claims.implementation_goal: Reopen `edit.assocdata.xref` from hard_blocked status and implement only if database_transaction_object_lifecycle_staged_write_residual can provide bounded, testable, non-registry-only evidence.
claims.preferred_route: ObjectARX transaction wrapper with DocumentLock, staged DWG copy, explicit commit/abort evidence, and QSAVE only at script level if needed
claims.fallback_route: read-only audit/evidence route; remain blocked if operation cannot prove staged-write safety
expected_files: config/operations.v2.json (status/evidence update only after a real implementation)
transaction/staged-write handler and fixture files to be discovered during implementation
claims.test_requirement: Add tests that prove original CAD sources are unchanged and staged copies contain the intended transaction/audit effect.
claims.evidence_requirement: Capture original/staged hash or mtime evidence, transaction log, operation artifact, and gate verifier output.
